D2 Vision L3 Apply Reference

Hermann Grid & Lateral Inhibition

slide the bar width and watch ghostly grey blobs flicker at the crossings you aren't looking at

A crossing is flanked by light on four sides, a street by only two. The extra surround inhibition dims the crossing — but only in the periphery, where fields are large.

Let your gaze wander across the grid and watch grey blobs appear at the crossings you are not fixating. Slide the bar width to change field coverage, and toggle the overlay to see why a crossing is inhibited more than a street.
